channel.title: +Articles on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Contra tenkalai rAjagopAla
item.description:
Source: here.

Vaṇśaṭhakōpadayā

Intro

There exists this book “The origin and growth of Ahobila maTha – A study based on inscriptions” authored by a certain TA Rajagopalan. While it purports to be a scholarly work tracing the Origins of Ahobila maTha and Vadakalai Lineages in General, it is anything but scholarly and is filled with lies and fraud interspersed with few truths and illogical conclusions based on the facts presented. Instead of the scholarly stature claimed, all we come across is preposterous ahistorical claims and abuses on the ‘other side’ fuelling sectarian hatred. In contrast, our approach here strongly favours facts, and objectivity.

item.title: Ahobila jIyar contribution
item.description:
CONTRIBUTION OF THE JĪYARS OF ŚRĪ AHOBILA MAṬHA TO ŚRĪVAIṢṆAVA PHILOSOPHY AND RELIGION

THESIS SUBMITTED TO THE UNIVERSITY OF MADRAS FOR THE AWARD OF THE DEGREE OF DOCTOR OF PHILOSOPHY IN VAISHNAVISM

RESEARCH SCHOLAR: MRS. K. ANURADHA, M.A. Department of Vaishnavism University of Madras Madras - 600 005

RESEARCH SUPERVISOR: DR. M. NARASIMHACHARY Professor & Head Department of Vaishnavism University of Madras. Madras - 600 005

DEPARTMENT OF VAISHNAVISM UNIVERSITY OF MADRAS MADRAS 600 005

item.title: RAjagopAla on tenkalai origins
item.description:
Source: TW

विश्वास-टिप्पनी

This is dismissed in sundara-mAlola’s article in detail.

Sri: Srimathey Ramanujaya Nama:

(A study based on inscriptions) by T.A.RAJAGOPALAN

[Image: Archa Vigraha of Adhi Van Satakopa Jeeyar at Melkote]

Archa Vigraha of Adhi Van Satakopa Jeeyar at Melkote

8-8-2005 - 23rd Aadi - Parthiva - Thiruvadi Pooram.

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

Published by: DIVYA DESA PARAMPARIYA PADHUKAPPU PERAVAI 214, East Uthara Street, Srirangam, Trichy - 620 006

Rs.20/- Postage Extra

item.title: Temple control
item.description:
Source: sundara-mAlola

Joint with tAtAryas

Eechambadi tAtAryas have rights in Thiruvaheendrapuram, Nachiyarkoil.

Had joint rights with Ahobila Matha in Thiruvallur. They got this rights as a representative of tatacharyas - thus historically was TT rights. ahobilamatha tookover the full admin in 1842. Now maTha’s agent, Madabushi family and Nemili family are the hereditary admins.

Other temples

Other than these four Divyadeshas are under Ahobila Matha nirvaha (Ahobilam Thiruvallur Adhanoor and Pullaboothankudi).
